---
title: "Travel"
---

A collection of places I've visited. Newest trips first.

<!-- 添加新旅行时，复制下面的模板并填入真实信息，放在最上面 -->

## 2025.04 — Yalong Bay（亚龙湾）

:::: {.travel-card}

::: {.travel-date}
April 26, 2025
:::

::: {.travel-location}
Yalong Bay, Sanya, China
:::

Went scuba diving at Yalong Bay — crystal-clear water and colorful coral reefs beneath the surface.

::: {.travel-gallery}
![Scuba diving at Yalong Bay](images/travel/sanya-yalong-1.jpg)

![Resting spot after diving](images/travel/sanya-yalong-2.jpg)
:::

::::

## 2025.04 — West Island（西岛）

:::: {.travel-card}

::: {.travel-date}
April 20–21, 2025
:::

::: {.travel-location}
West Island (Xidao), Sanya, China
:::

Spent two days on West Island — sandy beaches, swaying coconut palms, and turquoise sea. Tried beachcombing at low tide and even caught a tropical fish by hand.

::: {.travel-gallery}
![Sandy beach](images/travel/sanya-xidao-1.jpg)

![Coconut palms](images/travel/sanya-xidao-2.jpg)

![Fisherman on the island](images/travel/sanya-xidao-3.jpg)

![Seafood noodles](images/travel/sanya-xidao-4.jpg)

![The sea around West Island](images/travel/sanya-xidao-5.jpg)

![Tropical fish caught while beachcombing](images/travel/sanya-xidao-6.jpg)
:::

::::

## 2025.04 — Tianya Town（天涯小镇）

:::: {.travel-card}

::: {.travel-date}
April 19–20, 2025
:::

::: {.travel-location}
Tianya Town, Sanya, China
:::

First stop in Sanya — the cozy Tianya Town with an ocean-view room overlooking the South China Sea. Forecast said cloudy, but turned out bright and sunny.

::: {.travel-gallery}
![Tianya Town](images/travel/sanya-tianya-1.jpg)

![Ocean-view room](images/travel/sanya-tianya-2.jpg)
:::

::::
